title: System crash on "Generate SPARQL compilation report"
description:
When using the function "Generate SPARQL compilation report" (instead of executing the query) for the query:
select distinct ?g where {graph ?g {?s ?p ?o}}

causes an immediate Virtuoso crash:
12:06:31 Roll forward complete
12:06:39 Checkpoint started
12:06:42 Checkpoint finished, log reused
12:06:42 HTTP/WebDAV server online at 8890
12:06:42 Server online at 1111 (pid 12188)
*** buffer overflow detected ***: virtuoso-t terminated
Aborted (core dumped)

this happens even after a fresh reboot and restart of Virtuoso.  Other queries run fine, but when trying to run the above query, it was taking a long time which is why I was trying to get a compilation report.
Server info:
virtuoso-t -?
Virtuoso Open Source Edition (Column Store) (multi threaded)
Version 7.2.8-dev.3234-pthreads as of Aug 1 2022 (0224008)
Compiled for Linux (x86_64-pc-linux-gnu)
Data amount:
8,509,163,105 triples over multiple graphs.
key_bug_features: Generate SPARQL compilation report causes system crash
